description: Style Noteenamor is a brand that has become synonymous with femininity, style and luxury. Give your lingerie drawer a quirky twist with this lacy piece from the brand. Its blended composition ensures a snug and comfortable Fit.Product DetailsPink briefs, lace front panel, back panel with circular cutout near the waistband, pink binding at waist, soft fabric panel inlay at crotch, stretchableMaterial and CareLace- 96% Nylon 14% Elastic and Back- 91% Nylon 9%Hand wash coldDrip dry in shadeSize and FitMid Rise The model( height 5'8"and waist 28") is wearing a size M
